mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, role_type_id, driver_status_type_id, name, vehicle_make) VALUES ( lower(#{email}), #{passwordHash}, #{roleTypeId}, 3 NULL, #{name}, #{vehicleMake} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, email, password_hash, role_type_id, driver_status_type_id, name, vehicle_make, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE lower(email) = lower(#{email}) AND delete_info IS NULL
SELECT id, email, password_hash, role_type_id, driver_status_type_id, name, vehicle_make, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE id = #{id}::uuid AND delete_info IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET driver_status_type_id = #{driverStatusTypeId}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid AND delete_info IS NULL
